userClippingsRoot.name: ISK3 Overages
userClippingsRoot.content:
Hello FC Team,

It is requested that whenever the SLP team requests to perform an investigation on any overages or suggests particular overages, kindly ensure to provide the shipment ID under which those overages were actually received.

It has been observed multiple times that PO-level details alone cannot be considered as valid overages. To validate and proceed with any suggested overages, we need complete and accurate shipment-level findings along with a proper justification as to why those overages should be treated as valid.

Please note that if the claiming shipment and the suggested overage shipment were unloaded on the same day, then such overages can be considered valid. However, suggesting overages from unrelated or different shipment IDs, which have no connection to the claiming shipment, is incorrect and leads to unnecessary correspondences.

When it is clearly visible that the units were not received under the claiming shipment ID, please refrain from suggesting overages by randomly stating, “If units are not available under this PO, use this PO or that PO.” Such statements do not hold operational validity.

Hence, requesting you to:

Provide shipment ID(s) for all suggested overages.

Share valid supporting findings explaining why the overages should be considered as genuine.

Avoid suggesting irrelevant overages from unrelated shipments to prevent unnecessary delays in resolution.

Your attention and cooperation on this matter will help in ensuring faster and more accurate closure of the ticket.
